Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement And Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Apr-27-2021 Advanced From Jun-08-21 To May-12-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement And Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar May-14-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Tour-Sarkissian appeared by zoom for Linda Lester (Petitioner/Successor Trustee).
Levon Sagatelyan appeared by zoom for Armenian General Benevolent Union (Primary Beneficiary).

Mr. Tour-Sarkissian stated that the three matters that were on calendar on April 28th have been resolved and that they have reached a settlement. The Court stated that it is pleased that the parties were able to work this out, that the settlement agreement seems reasonable and noted that there are no objections. The Petition for Approval of Settlement Agreement and Appointment of Successor Trustee is under submission with the Court's intent to grant the petition.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

Petition For Order To Amend And Restate Trust
Off Calendar Feb-01-2021 Continued To Apr-28-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order To Amend And Restate Trust
Off Calendar Jan-12-2021 Continued To Feb-01-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Trang La appeared by zoom for Linda Lester (Trustee).
Sumble Manzoor appeared by zoom for Armenian General Benevolent Union (Beneficiary).
Konstantine Demiris appeared by zoom for and with James Soto (Beneficiary) by zoom.

The Court stated that it received a declaration under 170.6 and asked the parties if there was anything they wanted to add. The parties had nothing to add. The Court stated that it accepts the challenge and continued the Petition for Order to Amend and Restate Trust to February 1, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to Judge Ross Moody's calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
